rationale: The proposed change to the Tax Code homestead exemption has no relation to Educ. Code §33.092, which governs student election clerks applying service time toward school projects or extracurricular requirements.
quote: A student who is appointed as a student election clerk under Section 32.0511, Election Code, or as a student early voting clerk under Section 83.012, Election Code, may apply the time served as a student election clerk or student early voting clerk toward:
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns student election clerks, unrelated to homestead exemption.
